title: ArtifactRegistryEntry
description: Queryable current and versioned artifact/status record. Derived/query truth — not a replacement for event sourcing.

work_item_id.description: Work item that produced this artifact.

kind.description: Pack-registered artifact type (e.g. plan, plan-review, review-adoption, plan-v2, execution-report, code-audit, final-audit, summary).

phase.description: Pack-registered phase when this artifact was produced.

phase_category.description: Optional common category for cross-pack queries.

state.description: Core state when this artifact entry was created.

path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the artifact file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact file content.

produced_by_run_id.description: Run identifier of the agent instance that produced this artifact.

source_event_id.description: Event that triggered the creation of this artifact entry.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was created.
